title: Chickpea Genomics Consortium on Drought Tolerance
abstract: A consortium involving four leading research centers in India – ICRISAT, Patancheru; National Research Centre on Plant Biotechnology (NRCPB), New Delhi; Indian Agricultural Research Institute (IARI), New Delhi; and Sardar Vallabhbhai Patel University of Agriculture and Technology (SVPUAT), Meerut – has been funded by the National Fund for Basic & Strategic Research (NFBSR) of the Indian Council of Agricultural Research (ICAR) for five years (2006–11).
